instruction: The functions process_admins, process_managers, and process_engineers in util.py duplicate the same filter+normalize logic with only the role string differing. Refactor util.py to share the common logic via a single helper function. The public API must NOT change: process_admins, process_managers, and process_engineers must all remain importable from util with the same names and behavior. All tests in tests/test_util.py must continue to pass.
